name: Smoked Chicken Tortilla W/Tomato Salsa&avocado Relish (Gr)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare a charcoal or wood fire in a domed grill and let it burn down to embers.
2. Lay chips of soaked aromatic wood over the ashes (just enough smoke is needed, not a very hot fire).
3. Arrange the thighs on the grill rack. Open the top vent slightly and cover the grill so that the smoke stays inside.
4. Place thighs on the grill and cook for 3 minutes per side.
5. Serve sliced chicken on individual plates or bowls with grilled tortillas, tomato salsa, and avocado relish.
Yield: 4 servings
